mapper.insert: /* wms-ctmaster-icgrade-sql-oracle.xml - insertTworkInfoIcGrade */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IC_GRADE ( CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , FROBDAY , TOOBDAY , OBQTY , CTNOBQTY , PLTOBQTY , OBCBM , AVGOBQTY , AVGCTNOBQTY , AVGPLTOBQTY , AVGOBCBM , CNVRTOBQTY , CNVRTCTNOBQTY , CNVRTPLTOBQTY , CNVRTOBCBM , DSBTGRADECD , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , SUBSTR(#{sysdate}, 0, 8) , #{obcnfrmfrdate} , #{obcnfrmtodate} , A.OBQTY , A.OBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY AS CTNOBQTY , CASE WHEN PLT.ICUNITQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.OBQTY / PLT.ICUNITQTY WHEN CTN.CPPQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.OBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY / (CASE WHEN CTN.CPPQTY = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CTN.CPPQTY END) ELSE 0 END AS PLTOBQTY , A.OBQTY * EA.VOL AS OBCBM , A.AVGOBQTY , A.AVGOBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY AS AVGCTNOBQTY , CASE WHEN PLT.ICUNITQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.AVGOBQTY / PLT.ICUNITQTY WHEN CTN.CPPQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.AVGOBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY / (CASE WHEN CTN.CPPQTY = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CTN.CPPQTY END) ELSE 0 END AS AVGPLTOBQTY , A.AVGOBQTY * EA.VOL AS AVGOBCBM , A.AVGOBQTY * GH.IVAVDAYS AS CNVRTOBQTY , (A.AVGOBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY) * GH.IVAVDAYS AS CNVRTCTNOBQTY , (CASE WHEN PLT.ICUNITQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.AVGOBQTY / PLT.ICUNITQTY WHEN CTN.CPPQTY IS NOT NULL THEN A.AVGOBQTY / CTN.ICUNITQTY / (CASE WHEN CTN.CPPQTY = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CTN.CPPQTY END) ELSE 0 END) * GH.IVAVDAYS AS CNVRTPLTOBQTY , (A.AVGOBQTY * EA.VOL) * GH.IVAVDAYS AS CNVRTOBCBM , A.DSBTGRADECD , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.ICUNITKEY , A.UOM , A.DSBTGRADECD , SUM(A.CNFRMQTY) AS OBQTY , AVG(A.CNFRMQTY) AS AVGOBQTY FROM ( SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.ICUNITKEY , OD.UOM , SUM(OD.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY -- 확정수량으로 변경 , IC.DSBTGRADECD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD -- FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH -- INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD -- ON OD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY -- AND OD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY -- AND OD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = OD.ICKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OBCNFRMDATE BETWEEN #{obcnfrmfrdate} AND #{obcnfrmtodate} GROUP BY OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.ICUNITKEY , OD.UOM , IC.DSBTGRADECD , SUBSTR(OD.OBCNFRMDATE, 0, 8) ) A GROUP BY A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.ICUNITKEY , A.UOM , A.DSBTGRADECD ) A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_GRADE_HD GH ON GH.CTKEY = A.CTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE EA ON EA.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND EA.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND EA.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND EA.ICUNITKEY = A.ICUNITKEY AND EA.ICUNITTYPECD = A.UOM AND EA.ICUNITTYPECD = 'EA' LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE CTN ON CTN.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND CTN.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND CTN.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND CTN.ICUNITKEY = A.ICUNITKEY AND CTN.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE PLT ON PLT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND PLT.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND PLT.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND PLT.ICUNITKEY = A.ICUNITKEY AND PLT.ICUNITTYPECD = 'PLT'
mapper.select: /* wms-ctmaster-icgrade-sql-oracle.xml - selectDayAvgObQtyInfoMap */ SELECT T1.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , CT.CTNM , T1.AVDAYS /* 가용일수 */ , T1.CRITDAYS /* 기준일수 */ , T1.OBQTYCALCRITCD /* 출고량산정기준코드 */ , T1.INSERTDATE , T1.INSERTURKEY , T1.UPDATEDATE , T1.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_DAY_AVG_OBQTY T1 INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = T1.CTKEY WHERE T1.CTKEY = #{ctkey}

/* wms-ctmaster-icgrade-sql-oracle.xml - selectIcGradeMstMap */ SELECT GH.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , GH.IVAVDAYS , GH.CMT , GH.INSERTDATE , GH.INSERTURKEY , GH.UPDATEDATE , GH.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_GRADE_HD GH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = GH.CTKEY WHERE GH.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
